readAloudText.Wonder: Mica spread a listening map across the grass, and everyone placed one calm idea on it.
readAloudText.Explore: Mica spread a green listening map across the grass. Instead of talking over each other, each friend placed one calm idea in the middle and watched the lantern brighten.

title: Starblanket Helpers
storyBeat: The helpers crossed the whisper bridge by matching their steps to the lantern’s slow glow.

readAloudText.Drift: They crossed the bridge with slow, careful steps.
readAloudText.Wonder: The helpers crossed the whisper bridge by matching every step to the lantern’s slow and steady glow.
readAloudText.Explore: The whisper bridge shimmered under their feet. The helpers crossed not by leaping, but by matching every step to the lantern’s slow and steady glow.

title: Starblanket Helpers
storyBeat: At the sleepy lookout, each friend used a different gentle power: noticing, waiting, and encouraging.

readAloudText.Drift: Each friend used a gentle power.
readAloudText.Wonder: At the sleepy lookout, Nova noticed, Ollie waited, and Mica encouraged until the lantern felt ready.
readAloudText.Explore: At the sleepy lookout, each helper used a different gentle power. Nova noticed the safest path, Ollie waited without rushing, and Mica encouraged the lantern in a soft voice.

title: Starblanket Helpers
storyBeat: The lantern rose into the sky quilt, brighter because the helpers had moved together instead of trying to be the loudest hero.

readAloudText.Drift: The lantern floated back to the sky.
readAloudText.Wonder: The lantern rose into the sky quilt, shining brighter because the helpers had worked together.

title: Starblanket Helpers
storyBeat: Nova, Ollie, and Mica folded their capes beside the hill and learned that the strongest superpower before sleep was helping the night feel safe.

readAloudText.Drift: The helpers folded their capes and rested.
readAloudText.Wonder: Nova, Ollie, and Mica folded their capes beside the hill, proud of their quiet brave hearts.
readAloudText.Explore: Nova, Ollie, and Mica folded their capes beside the hill. They had learned that the strongest bedtime superpower was helping the night feel safe, then letting it grow still.
